title: phyla reptans
intro: Phyla reptans, also known as frog's-bit or snake-grass, is a perennial aquatic plant native to North America, characterized by its small white flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help treat various health issues. The health benefits of Phyla reptans include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Phyla reptans, such as tinctures and infusions, can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or using a solvent to extract its medicinal compounds.
